content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Clone Graph". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/clone-graph/
constraints: Node.val is unique for each node.
Number of nodes will not exceed 100
content.inputFormat: The input is a graph represented as an adjacency list, where each node is an instance of the Node class with a val and a list of its neighbors.
content.outputFormat: The output is the cloned graph, where each node is a new instance of the Node class with the same val and neighbors as the corresponding node in the original graph.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a depth-first search (DFS) or breadth-first search (BFS) approach to traverse the graph and clone each node.
